openSession(bytes32,uint8,bytes32,uint25.details: Pass `msg.value == 0` to consume from `dotBalances`, otherwise `msg.value` must equal `_internalToNative(amountInternal)`      and the escrow credits native into the lock without touching `dotBalances`.

depositDot().notice: Accept native DOT and credit internal DOT-denominated balance.

depositUsdcAsDot(uint256).notice: Pull USDC using current oracle rates (no staleness bound, zero min dot out).

depositUsdcAsDot(uint256,uint256,uint256.notice: Pull USDC with optional slippage (`minDotInternalOut`) and oracle freshness (`maxOracleAgeSecs`, use `type(uint256).max` to skip).

internalCirculating().notice: Total internal‑DOT liabilities: free user balances, locked funds, and provider balances.

nativeDotDecimals().notice: Smallest-units per whole native token on this chain (Hub DOT: 10 = Planck; standard EVM dev: 18 = wei).

openSession(bytes32,uint8,bytes32,uint25.notice: Opens a tier-aware session, locking `amountInternal` for `(msg.sender, nodeId)`.

openSessionCountByNode(bytes32).notice: Non-settled sessions per `nodeId`; decremented exactly once when `settled` becomes true.

protocolBalances().notice: Internal DOT accrued for the protocol treasury from settlement fees.

protocolFeeBps().notice: Protocol fee on provider payout at settlement, in basis points (100 = 1%).

protocolTreasury().notice: Treasury wallet for protocol fee accrual at settlement (internal DOT balance via `protocolBalances`).

providerBalances(bytes32).notice: Internal DOT credited to a node (`nodeId`) from session settles; withdrawn by the node operator.

recordUsage(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Records token usage; escrow prices via ModelPriceOracle. Callable by session provider or `recordUsageRole`.

recordUsageRole().notice: Router / infrastructure EOA authorized to call `recordUsage` (metering role).

setProtocolFeeBps(uint256).notice: Registry owner sets protocol fee on provider settles (basis points, max 1000 = 10%).

setProtocolTreasury(address).notice: Registry owner assigns the protocol treasury wallet.

setRecordUsage(address).notice: Registry owner assigns the router metering EOA for `recordUsage`.

setSettlementOperator(address).notice: Registry owner assigns the settlement operator (may be `address(0)` to disable operator settles).

setTeePriceMultiplierBps(uint256).notice: Registry owner sets the TEE tier price multiplier (10_000 = 1x, 15_000 = 1.5x).

settleByOperatorFull(uint256,uint256,uin.notice: Operator-driven full settle of remaining lock.

settleByOperatorPartial(uint256,uint256,.notice: Operator-driven partial settle; bounded so provider receipts never exceed claimed usage (`usageRecorded`).

settleFull(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Like `settlePartial` but requires paying out the entire remaining lock (session user only — escape hatch).

settlePartial(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Releases up to remaining lock: pays provider escrow credit and refunds user balance (session user only — escape hatch).

settlementOperator().notice: Privileged role that finalizes settlement splits (`settleByOperator*`). Set by registry governance (`registry.owner()`).

teePriceMultiplierBps().notice: TEE tier billing multiplier in basis points (default 15_000 = 1.5x).

totalLockedInternal().notice: Sum of `Session.lockedInternal` across non-settled sessions (and settled sessions hold `lockedInternal == 0`).

withdrawDot(uint256).notice: Withdraw internal balance back to native DOT.

withdrawProtocolDot(uint256).notice: Treasury withdraws accrued protocol internal DOT as native DOT.

withdrawProviderDot(bytes32,uint256).notice: Withdraw internal balance accrued for `nodeId` (caller must be `registry.nodeOperator(nodeId)`), paid as native DOT.
